news.title: 伊朗新主上任，世界炸锅
克罗地亚恢复强制兵役，数百青年报到
news.title0: Hundreds of teenagers report for duty as Croatia reinstates conscription
news.content: 克罗地亚时隔16年重启强制兵役，首批约800名青年已报到，以应对乌克兰战争后的地区安全局势变化。
news.content0: Hundreds of teenage Croatians have reported for compulsory military service – for the first time since their country scrapped the requirement in 2008.
news.author: BBC

news.title: 加拿大冰层断裂，23名冰钓者被直升机救起
news.title0: Canadian officials rescue 23 people who floated away on ice sheet
news.content: 加拿大安大略省休伦湖上一块冰层断裂，载着23名冰钓者漂离岸边约2公里，救援人员出动直升机将所有人救回。
news.content0: Twenty-three people have been rescued by helicopter crews in Ontario, Canada, after the ice shelf they were standing on broke, sending the group floating into Lake Huron.
news.author: BBC

news.title: 美国教师被学生恶作剧车辆意外撞死
news.title0: US teacher killed after toilet paper prank goes wrong
news.content: 美国佐治亚州一名高中教师在自家门外试图“抓包”用厕纸恶作剧的学生时滑倒，被学生慌乱中驾驶的车辆意外撞死。
news.content0: A high school teacher in Georgia was accidentally run over and killed outside his home when a toilet paper prank carried out by his students went terribly wrong, officials said.
news.author: BBC

news.title: 尤金妮公主卸任反奴隶制慈善机构赞助人
news.title0: Princess Eugenie steps down from anti-slavery charity
news.content: 英国尤金妮公主在担任赞助人七年后，辞去了反奴隶制国际慈善机构的职务，此举正值其父安德鲁王子与爱泼斯坦的关联引发持续关注之际。
news.content0: Princess Eugenie has stepped down as patron of charity Anti-Slavery International, a role she has held for seven years.
news.author: BBC

news.title: AI鉴定名画真伪，挑战艺术史学家共识
news.title0: Masterpiece or cheap copy? Art historians and AI may not agree
news.content: 人工智能分析称，一幅长期被认为是卡拉瓦乔作品复制品的画作有86%的可能性是真迹，这与艺术史学界的传统鉴定结论相左。
news.content0: To the untrained eye, there is very little difference between the three known versions of “The Lute Player.” Almost identical in composition, the paintings all depict a young, doe-eyed subject in white robes, instrument in hand and turned slightly away from the viewer. Each appears to carry Italian painter Caravaggio’s signature mastery of light and shadow.
news.author: CNN

news.title: 新西兰慈善店收到意外捐赠：大麻和现金
news.title0: Bag containing weed and cash accidentally donated to New Zealand charity shop
news.content: 新西兰一家慈善商店的志愿者在一个捐赠背包中发现43克大麻和3700新西兰元现金，两名青少年随后惊慌返回试图取回。
news.content0: Two teenagers mistakenly left a knapsack containing marijuana and cash at a donation area outside a New Zealand charity shop then returned in a panic to retrieve the bag, police said Monday.
news.author: CNN

news.title: 土耳其总统主要政敌腐败案开审，庭上激烈交锋
news.title0: Trial of Erdogan’s Top Rival Begins in Turkey
news.content: 土耳其总统埃尔多安的主要政治对手、前伊斯坦布尔市长伊马姆奥卢因腐败指控受审，庭审伊始便与主审法官发生激烈言语冲突。
news.content0: The top political rival of President Recep Tayyip Erdogan of Turkey clashed with the head judge of a mass trial for him and hundreds of other defendants on corruption charges, just minutes after the first hearing began on Monday.
news.author: NYTimes

news.title: 法国向中东派遣大规模海军舰队
news.title0: France Is Sending a Large Naval Force to the Middle East
news.content: 法国总统马克龙宣布，将向地中海东部、红海和霍尔木兹海峡增派10艘军舰，以保护公民、盟友并可能护航油轮。
news.content0: France will send 10 warships to the Eastern Mediterranean, the Red Sea, and the Strait of Hormuz, where oil tanker traffic has been choked off by the war with Iran, in addition to the two ships already deployed to the Mediterranean, President Emmanuel Macron said on Monday.
news.author: NYTimes

news.title: 英国少女斯凯·布朗再夺滑板世界冠军
news.title0: British teen Sky Brown is skateboarding world champion again
news.content: 17岁的英国滑板选手斯凯·布朗在巴西再次夺得世界冠军头衔，她曾在14岁时首次获此殊荣。
news.content0: British teenager Sky Brown has become the new skateboarding world champion, after previously claiming the title aged 14.
news.author: Sky News
